case_title: KIRCHER, VINCENT vs. COX, GLORIA AKA DEVINE, ADAWNA

docket_entries.description: JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON FEB-11-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: NO APP BY DEFT AT SETTLEMENT CONF; JURY DEMAND STRICKEN.

JUDGE DESMOND, P.DOWLING/CSR, K.LEE 09:37AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. SIDNEY BERENSTEIN FOR THE PLTF AND NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFT GLORIA COX. THE WITNESS IS SWORN AND EVIDENCE IS ADMITTED. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AND AGAINST THE DEFT. PLTF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COX, GLORIA AKA DEVINE, ADAWNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1139 MARKET ST #114, S.F. $1,194.20 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,194.20, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL
